WeeMee is a miniature version of you. With just a few clicks, you can create
your own WeeMee absolutely free.

There are hundreds of looks to choose from, so you can make your WeeMee as
unique as you are! But the fun doesn't stop there -- once you've created your
WeeMee, visit WeeWorld
[http://message.aim.com/cgi-bin25/DM/y/hxHy0BTnFv50MqA0K5G0Ed], where you can
play games, send ecards and create email signatures to show your individuality
everywhere you go online.

body_html:
CARTOON-IFY YOURSELF

A WeeMee is a miniature version of you. With just a few clicks, you can create your own WeeMee absolutely free.

There are hundreds of looks to choose from, so you can make your WeeMee as unique as you are! But the fun doesn't stop there -- once you've created your WeeMee, visit WeeWorld, where you can play games, send ecards and create email signatures to show your individuality everywhere you go online.

Buddy Blast!
Want to share something fun with your buddies? Submit a message or link to AIM Share and everyone will be alerted right on their Buddy Lists.
You're So Popular!
Import your buddies by clicking Edit and Import Contacts on your Buddy List to snag contacts from other tools and services. Uncover a few more features you never knew.
Dogs Gone Wild
Crazy Canines At Their Best Watch for Free.
AIM Pro
Send secure business instant messages
Download Now.
Red-Hot Celeb Gossip
Fanatical about celebrities? Get the latest buzz for free!
AIM.com | Support | AIM Today | AIM Pages
© 2008 AOL LLC. All rights reserved.

*Requires text-enabled wireless device and service plan from your wireless carrier. Your wireless carrier may charge you for the wireless messages you send and receive, and for ringtone download. Pricing differs based on your carrier and messaging plan. Please consult your carrier for more details.

This message is being delivered to jeeproject@yahoo.com. You are receiving this information because of your activation of the AIM Mobile service. Click here to opt out of receiving future promotional E-mail messages from the AIM service. Click here for other Important Information About AIM Commercial E-mail.

AIM Email, PO Box 65834, Sterling, VA 20165-8807
